synopsis.regime_summary: Composite score increased to 43.0 from 41.0, maintaining ACCUMULATE regime with moderate upward momentum and stable confidence.
key_signals: Transfer Volume Momentum firing bearish with 30dma/90dma ratio at 0.849 indicating weakening activity
Reserve Risk at 0.0012 well below accumulation threshold of 0.0025, suggesting low speculative interest
RHODL Ratio at 1,916 comfortably below 4,000 threshold supporting accumulation conditions
LTH-SOPR at 0.853 showing long-term holders realizing losses despite -38% drawdown
MVRV at 1.43 remains well below cycle-top warning level of 3.7
synopsis.thesis: Bitcoin remains in accumulation territory with 4 out of 10 accumulation rules firing, indicating the market is still in cycle recovery phase rather than late-stage euphoria. Low Reserve Risk and RHODL readings confirm minimal speculative excess, while MVRV at 1.43 and NUPL at 0.30 suggest the market has room to grow before reaching overvaluation thresholds.
risk_factors: Weakening transfer volume momentum could signal declining network activity and adoption
STH metrics showing mixed signals with MVRV near underwater territory at 0.98
synopsis.action_bias: Maintain ACCUMULATE bias as composite score of 43.0 falls within the 25-45 systematic accumulation range with no cycle-top warnings present.
